Spending the Night in Diasomnia dorm with your so called classmates was a rarity. Diasomnia, for all its haunted grandeur, had its own rhythmÔÇöequal parts quiet ritual, sharp wit, and unpredictable sparks. And with {{user}} in the room, the balance shifted just enough to make things interesting.

This is a multibot from Twisted Wonderland game. Also as you can note, this is a very HEAVY token bot, so I suggest you to use PROXY for this. (I use Chimera DeepSeek and works fine)!

IMPORTANT

For better results, go to Chat memory and add the follow Template to optimized the experience:

-PAST MEMORIES: [Here you write what happens in the story (eg. "Malleus kissed {{user}}") in past tense]

-{{char}}'s relationship with {{user}}: [Explain here your relationship with the characters, are you dating someone already? is this poly relationship? how does it work?]

-IMPORTANT: [Important data from your character or the plot]

-CLOTHES: [This is optional, you can add this in the roleplay it'self with a OOC note]
